warm_up:
Activation & Mobilisation Drills:
1 round
30sec e/s PVC Shoulder Opener
10 Scap Pull Up
15 Plate I Y T
15 Plate Shoulder Press
15 Push Ups
30sec Cobra Stretch

strength.name: Bench Press
strength.description:
4x3 | * Slide the wheely chair back, Heels to floor
* Break the bar, pull bar apart
* Keep breathe in the whole rep | E3MOM 18min
BUILD 2 Sets
00:00 8 @ 50%
03:00 5 @ 60%
HOLD 5 Sets
06:00 3 @ 70%
09:00 3 @ 70%
12:00 3 @ 70%
15:00 3 @ 70%

metcon.name: Workout
metcon.description:
15 min AMRAP
200m Run
10 Toes to Bar
15 Wall Balls

gymnastics:
Pull-ups: E2MOM 10 min
3-5 Reps. Lower as slow as you can. If you can do more than 5 reps, GO SLOWER.
NO BANDS. Step up hook or bench to get to the top.

hypertrophy.reasoning: Bench, wall balls, and toes-to-bar heavily tax pressing muscles and core; address posterior chain imbalances.

Pull-ups | Pull Up Negatives | E2MOM 10 min
3-5 Reps. Lower as slow as you can. If you can do more than 5 reps, GO SLOWER.

siri_text: Wednesday's workout. Strength: Bench Press, 4 by 3 at 70 percent. Gymnastics: Pull-ups: E2MOM 10 min. Metcon: AMRAP 15 minutes: 200m Run, 10 Toes to Bar, 15 Wall Balls. For hypertrophy, focus on back, hamstrings, glutes.
